basic_details.job_title: Mizoram PSC Upper Division Clerk Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Mizoram Public Service Commission (Mizoram PSC) Upper Division Clerk Recruitment 2026 Notification has been released on 13 May 2026 on the official website of Mizoram PSC. A total of 7 vacancies have been announced through the Mizoram PSC Upper Division Clerk Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged between 18 to 35 years who have a Bachelor's Degree, Computer Proficiency, and Mizo Language Proficiency are eligible to apply for these UDC vacancies. The online application process for Mizoram PSC Upper Division Clerk Recruitment 2026 has started and will remain open until 19 June 2026. Candidates can d

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Upper age limit relaxable up to 5 years for ST/SC candidates or as may be notified by the Government from time to time.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor’s Degree, Computer Proficiency, Mizo Language Proficiency
qualification.details: Bachelor’s Degree from a recognized University. Computer Proficiency as prescribed by the Mizoram Group ‘A’, ‘B’ and ‘C’ posts Service/Recruitment (Amendment) Rules, 2023. Mizo Language Proficiency (pass mark in qualifying test; exempted if studied Mizo in Class-X (HSLC) or above within Mizoram or opted as MIL outside).

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Mizoram PSC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Mizoram PSC Upper Division Clerk Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Mizoram PSC UDC recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Mizoram PSC Upper Division Clerk (UDC) recruitment is 19-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the UDC post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies for the Upper Division Clerk (UDC) post released by the Mizoram Public Service Commission.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum age requirement for the UDC post?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for the Upper Division Clerk (UDC) post is 18 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the UDC post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Upper Division Clerk (UDC) post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. Are there any age relaxations for ST/SC candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, the upper age limit is relaxable up to 5 years for ST/SC candidates or as may be notified by the Government from time to time.

faq.question: Q6. What is the educational qualification required for the UDC post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor’s Degree from a recognized University, along with Computer Proficiency and Mizo Language Proficiency.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for the Upper Division Clerk (UDC) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary as per Level-6 in the Pay Matrix.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Online.

faq.question: Q9. What are the selection stages for the UDC recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Direct Recruitment Examination followed by a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the links to the official notification and the online application form in the "Important Links" section of this article.
